titleStmt.title: SII 34.64: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 64. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājarājakēsarivarman Rājarāja I, 26th year = A.D. 1014.
Gift of 10 kaḻañju of gold by a madhyastha of the brahmadēya village Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam for a lamp to the Tirukkārkōṭakīśvaram temple at Tirunallūr in the same village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlap peruṉilac celviyum taṉakkEyurimai pū
ṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi vēṅkai ṉāṭum
kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai ṉāṭum
kollamuṅkaliṅkamum Eṇṭicaipukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi
Ēḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāl koṇṭa taṉneḻil vaḷar
Ūḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭēy ceḻiyar tēcuko
ḷ śrī kōvirājarājakēcari panmakku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu rājentirasiṅka vaḷanāṭṭu viṟai
kkūṟṟattu prahmadeyam kāmaravalliccaturvetimaṅkalattu tirunallūrt tirukkāṟ kōṭakīśva
rattu mahādevarkku Ivvūr madhyastaṉ Irunūṟṟuvaṉ muppattaiyvanāṉa kaṟpakātittaṉ
cantirātittavaṟ pakalumiravum Eriya vaitta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu It tirunontāviḷakku Oṉ
ṟukkum Ittēvar paṇṭārattē Ittēvarkaṉmikaḷ vacamivaṉ vaitta poṉ patinkaḻañcu
Ippon patin kaḻañcukkum palicaicekuttu Ittēvar paṇṭārattēy nicatam Uḻak
keṇṇaiyaṭṭi cantirātittaval Oru tirunontāviḷakku Erikka kaṭavomānōn tēvar kanmikaḷom I
tu panmaheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 34.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
